title: Sleepless Nights
description: Embrace your fears. Now with a fully fledged Thriller version out!
body:
![Sleepless Nights Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4817ad0190367def910856fbc770e20bc7183006.png)

Sleepless Nights is all about expanding the true quality of what horror is in Minecraft. We are trying to make this mod-pack as scary as possible while keeping the original Minecraft blocky feel. All this is possible through our dark nights, expansive mobs, ever-changing terrain, and story-based quests. We dare you to try if you believe you can take on this pack.


![Skull line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/147561905aaf962fb579892292f5341525c494e5.png)

### Why Sleepless Nights?

> Expansive worlds
> 
> Dark nights
> 
> Never-ending content updates
> 
> Horrific Mobs
> 
> RPG style weapons
> 
> Story-quest system
> 
> Dark stylized graphics
> 
> Realistic physics system
> 
> Custom resource-packs made specially for **Sleepless Nights**
> 
> Custom mods made specifically for **Sleepless Nights**
> 
> **First** and **Only** _quality_ horror-based modpack


  _Don't believe us? Try it for yourself 😉_
 
![Skull line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/147561905aaf962fb579892292f5341525c494e5.png)

### Performance

Sleepless Nights is made with optimization in mind. We know not every PC will be able to run our mod-pack considering the level of shaders we have installed. If you are having frame issues please try the following;

> Reducing render distance by a few chunks
> 
> Lower simulation distance
> 
> Increase the RAM maximum for the mod-pack

**_Under no circumstances should you turn the shaders off._**

![Skull line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/147561905aaf962fb579892292f5341525c494e5.png)

### Support

If you are looking to support us, Array Studios, please do so through our patron and by joining our discord. The support is always appreciated.

![Skull line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/147561905aaf962fb579892292f5341525c494e5.png)

# Q&A 

> **Q**: Will Sleepless Nights be available on CurseForge?
> 
> **A**: Due to mod license issues, Sleepless Nights isn't available on CurseForge.

> **Q**: Will there be a VR version of Sleepless Nights?
> 
> **A**: No, due to mod compatibility reasons Sleepless Nights isn't available on VR
>
> **[/]**: A Thriller VR Port is in the works.
>
> **Q**: Is there a server file for Sleepless Nights?
> 
> **A**: Yes, on select SLN versions we feature the server file as an extra download.

![Skull line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/147561905aaf962fb579892292f5341525c494e5.png)

### Fabric Port

Sleepless Nights now has a fully compatible fabric version. Here is the run down;

> Less mods
> 
> Better performance
>
> A better scary vibe
> 
> No quest system
> 
> No physics system
> 
> Original SLN mods are not compatible.

1.0 is the Fabric Port

![Array Studios mark.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7faf1c12e8267411ed2cfa0f9281d5856766afa.png)
